message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker with latest status transitions

Update beads issue database with status changes from concurrent agent
work sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -460,7 +460,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-ldj.3","title":"Symbols: resolver/NSS family (getaddrinfo/gethostbyname/getpwnam/getgrnam)","description":"Implement NSS/resolver: DNS resolution, passwd/group/service database queries. Complex due to nsswitch.conf configuration, dlopen plugin loading, and network-dependent behavior. Shadow-run against glibc resolver as primary conformance mechanism.

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AzureBluff","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:00:11.680392969Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T17:06:30.286694402Z","closed_at":"2026-02-19T17:06:30.286673172Z","close_reason":"Native gethostbyname/gethostbyname_r implemented with deterministic tests/fixtures; resolver/NSS symbol set in bead title now covered without glibc call-through.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenlibc","nss","resolver","symbols"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ldj.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ldj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1118,"issue_id":"bd-ldj.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented native resolver/NSS coverage slice for `bd-ldj.3`:

- Replaced `gethostbyname` glibc call-through with native deterministic path in `crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/resolv_abi.rs`:
  - numeric IPv4 resolution
  - `/etc/hosts` subset resolution
  - thread-local `hostent` storage for non-reentrant API
  - strict/hardened runtime-policy gating and hardened safe-default fallback
- Replaced `gethostbyname_r` glibc call-through by wiring `inet_abi` to shared native implementation in `resolv_abi`:
  - bounded writes into caller buffers
  - deterministic `ERANGE`/`ENOENT` failure behavior
  - `h_errno`-style deterministic codes (`HOST_NOT_FOUND=1`, `NO_RECOVERY=3`)
- Added ABI tests in `crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/resolv_abi_test.rs`:
  - `gethostbyname_numeric_ipv4_returns_hostent`
  - `gethostbyname_unknown_host_returns_null`
  - `gethostbyname_r_numeric_ipv4_populates_result`
  - `gethostbyname_r_small_buffer_returns_erange`
  - `gethostbyname_r_unknown_host_returns_enoent`
- Added conformance executor support for `gethostbyname` in `crates/frankenlibc_conformance/src/lib.rs` and fixture coverage in `tests/conformance/fixtures/resolver.json` (strict+hardened numeric cases).
- Updated `support_matrix.json` entries for `gethostbyname` and `gethostbyname_r` from `GlibcCallThrough` to `Implemented` with explicit strict/hardened semantics.

Verification commands (all executed via `rch`):

- `rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test resolv_abi_test` ✅
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc_conformance execute_gethostbyname_case_numeric_ipv4_returns_pointer_shape -- --nocapture` ✅
- `rch exec -- cargo fmt --check` ✅
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` ✅
- `rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✅

Additional observed gate:

- `rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test support_matrix_maintenance_test` ❌
  - Failure: `maintenance_status_validation_above_threshold` with `Status validation 71.8% below 80% threshold`.
  - This is a global threshold gate and not specific to the `gethostbyname` changes.
","created_at":"2026-02-19T17:06:30Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ldj.4","title":"Symbols: iconv/locale family (iconv_open/iconv/setlocale/nl_langinfo)","description":"Implement iconv character set conversion and locale management. Requires supporting multiple encodings (UTF-8, ISO-8859-*, EUC-*, Shift_JIS, etc.) and locale-dependent formatting (LC_COLLATE, LC_CTYPE, LC_NUMERIC, LC_TIME, LC_MONETARY).

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"RusticWolf: Promoted nl_langinfo from GlibcCallThrough to Implemented (was already natively implemented, support_matrix was wrong). Added 4 new POSIX 2008 locale functions as Implemented: newlocale, uselocale, freelocale, duplocale. All use native C-locale semantics. Moved locale_abi to ungated Phase 2 section (safe in test mode). Added 7 locale_abi tests, all passing. Updated support_matrix: total_exported=974, implemented=574, glibc_call_through=103.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:00:11.769061214Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T05:21:33.152080561Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenlibc","iconv","locale","symbols"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ldj.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ldj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1119,"issue_id":"bd-ldj.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented conformance execution support for locale fixtures in this pass.\n\nChanges:\n- Added  and  dispatch arms in  .\n- Added locale helpers/executors:\n  -  for nullable fixture string inputs.\n  -  with deterministic host baseline reset () and C/POSIX canonicalization.\n  -  with strict host parity probe and hardened unsupported-locale fallback-to-.\n  -  returning pointer-shape output ( / ) with strict host parity probe.\n- Added unit tests:\n  - \n  - \n  - \n\nVerification (all cargo-heavy commands executed via ):\n1)  ✅ (39 passed)\n2)  ✅\n3)  ❌ blocked by pre-existing workspace issues outside this bead surface (notably in , plus existing  clippy style warning in this crate’s pre-existing test helper).\n4) Diff in /data/projects/frankenlibc/crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/pressure_sensor.rs:435:
     fn composite_score_bounded() {
         let calm = calm_signals();
         let score = calm.composite_score();
[31m-        assert!((0.0..=100.0).contains(&score), "score {score} out of bounds");
(B[m[32m+        assert!(
(B[m[32m+            (0.0..=100.0).contains(&score),
(B[m[32m+            "score {score} out of bounds"
(B[m[32m+        );
(B[m 
         let heavy = heavy_signals();
         let score = heavy.composite_score();
Diff in /data/projects/frankenlibc/crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/pressure_sensor.rs:442:
[31m-        assert!((0.0..=100.0).contains(&score), "score {score} out of bounds");
(B[m[32m+        assert!(
(B[m[32m+            (0.0..=100.0).contains(&score),
(B[m[32m+            "score {score} out of bounds"
(B[m[32m+        );
(B[m     }
 
     #[test] ❌ pre-existing formatting drift in .\n5)  ✅ command ran; summary ; remote artifact retrieval is currently not configured in  (no files pulled back).\n\nBead remains  because broader iconv/locale family scope still includes remaining symbol surfaces (e.g. ) and closure evidence aggregation.","created_at":"2026-02-15T04:20:54Z"},{"id":1120,"issue_id":"bd-ldj.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Superseding note for prior garbled comment (shell interpolation issue).

Implemented conformance execution support for locale fixtures in this pass.

Changes:
- Added `setlocale` and `localeconv` dispatch arms in `crates/frankenlibc_conformance/src/lib.rs` `execute_fixture_case`.
- Added locale helpers/executors:
  - `parse_optional_string` for nullable fixture string inputs.
  - `run_host_setlocale_case` with deterministic host baseline reset (`LC_ALL=C`) and C/POSIX canonicalization.
  - `execute_setlocale_case` with strict host parity probe and hardened unsupported-locale fallback to `C`.
  - `execute_localeconv_case` returning pointer-shape output (`NON_NULL_PTR` / `NULL_PTR`) with strict host parity probe.
- Added unit tests:
  - `execute_setlocale_case_strict_query_returns_c_locale`
  - `execute_setlocale_case_hardened_unsupported_locale_falls_back_to_c`
  - `execute_localeconv_case_strict_returns_non_null_ptr_shape`

Verification (cargo-heavy commands executed via `rch`):
1. `rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc_conformance` ✅ (39 passed)
2. `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` ✅
3. `rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` ❌ blocked by pre-existing workspace issues outside this bead surface (primarily in `frankenlibc-abi`; also existing test-helper style lint in `frankenlibc_conformance`).
4. `rch exec -- cargo fmt --check` ❌ pre-existing formatting drift in `crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/pressure_sensor.rs`.
5. `rch exec -- cargo run -p frankenlibc-harness --bin harness -- conformance-matrix --fixture tests/conformance/fixtures --output target/conformance/conformance_matrix.current.v1.json --mode both --campaign franken_shadow` ✅ command ran; summary `total=627 passed=319 failed=0 errors=308`; remote artifact retrieval is currently not configured in `rch`.

Bead remains `in_progress` because broader iconv/locale family scope still includes remaining symbol surfaces (e.g. `nl_langinfo`) and closure evidence aggregation.
","created_at":"2026-02-15T04:21:10Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ldj.5","title":"Symbols: Unit tests - per-symbol conformance fixtures","description":"Unit tests: per-symbol golden fixtures for each implemented symbol. Fixture format: input args + expected output + expected side effects + expected errno. Must cover normal paths, edge cases (NULL, zero-length, INT_MAX), and documented undefined behavior boundaries. Automate fixture generation from glibc runs.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:00:11.860911210Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T21:27:20.732938213Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T21:27:20.732870717Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenlibc","symbols","test","unit-test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ldj.5","depends_on_id":"bd-ldj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-ldj.6","title":"Symbols: E2E tests - real-world program conformance (shadow-run)","description":"E2E shadow-run tests: compile and run real programs (coreutils, busybox, redis, sqlite) against FrankenLibC and diff output vs glibc. Hierarchical delta debugging for failing traces. Performance budget comparison (must not exceed 2x glibc latency for any hot-path symbol).

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).

- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:00:11.953181975Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T04:42:56.066820565Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e-test","frankenlibc","shadow-run","symbols","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ldj.6","depends_on_id":"bd-ldj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ldj.6","depends_on_id":"bd-ldj.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1121,"issue_id":"bd-ldj.6","author":"BronzeBay","text":"Progress slice (BronzeBay): improved shadow-run divergence artifacts and aligned manifest coverage for smoke shadow labels.\n\nChanges:\n- scripts/e2e_suite.sh: on shadow mismatch now emits shadow.stdout.diff, shadow.stderr.diff, and shadow_divergence_report.txt; logs diff line counts; adds optional redis-server --version shadow compare case.\n- tests/conformance/e2e_scenario_manifest.v1.json: added smoke catalog entries for coreutils_cat_shadow/coreutils_sort/coreutils_wc/busybox_help/sqlite_memory_select/redis_cli_version/redis_server_version to remove manifest-mismatch failures for shadow-run cases.\n\nValidation:\n- bash -n scripts/e2e_suite.sh scripts/check_e2e_suite.sh => PASS\n- python3 scripts/validate_e2e_manifest.py validate --manifest tests/conformance/e2e_scenario_manifest.v1.json => PASS\n- python3 scripts/validate_e2e_manifest.py metadata --manifest tests/conformance/e2e_scenario_manifest.v1.json --scenario-class smoke --label redis_server_version --mode strict => PASS\n- bash scripts/check_e2e_suite.sh => PASS\n- TIMEOUT_SECONDS=3 FRANKENLIBC_E2E_SEED=424243 bash scripts/e2e_suite.sh smoke strict => exit 1 due existing interpose-stage runtime failures, but case_manifest_mismatch count is now 0 (previously nonzero).\n\nWorkspace gate status (offloaded with rch): cargo fmt/check/clippy still fail on pre-existing unrelated frankenlibc-abi issues in fortify_abi.rs/stdbit_abi.rs.","created_at":"2026-02-26T04:42:56Z"}]}

### Mandatory Verification Gate

- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.

- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist

logs diff line counts; adds optional redis-server --version shadow compare case.\n- tests/conformance/e2e_scenario_manifest.v1.json: added smoke catalog entries for coreutils_cat_shadow/coreutils_sort/coreutils_wc/busybox_help/sqlite_memory_select/redis_cli_version/redis_server_version to remove manifest-mismatch failures for shadow-run cases.\n\nValidation:\n- bash -n scripts/e2e_suite.sh scripts/check_e2e_suite.sh => PASS\n- python3 scripts/validate_e2e_manifest.py validate --manifest tests/conformance/e2e_scenario_manifest.v1.json => PASS\n- python3 scripts/validate_e2e_manifest.py metadata --manifest tests/conformance/e2e_scenario_manifest.v1.json --scenario-class smoke --label redis_server_version --mode strict => PASS\n- bash scripts/check_e2e_suite.sh => PASS\n- TIMEOUT_SECONDS=3 FRANKENLIBC_E2E_SEED=424243 bash scripts/e2e_suite.sh smoke strict => exit 1 due existing interpose-stage runtime failures, but case_manifest_mismatch count is now 0 (previously nonzero).\n\nWorkspace gate status (offloaded with rch): cargo fmt/check/clippy still fail on pre-existing unrelated frankenlibc-abi issues in fortify_abi.rs/stdbit_abi.rs.","created_at":"2026-02-26T04:42:56Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ldj.7","title":"Symbols: Coverage tracking dashboard and classification gate","description":"Automated tracking: total symbols, per-category (Implemented/RawSyscall/GlibcCallThrough/Stub), coverage percentage. CI gate: no new Stub symbols permitted, reclassification requires conformance test passage. Emit metrics for symbol coverage trend.","notes":"2026-02-13 progress (SunnyOx): implemented symbol coverage tracking + classification gate extensions via support-matrix maintenance pipeline. Added coverage_dashboard (total/per-status/share/native%), trend deltas, symbol_status_map, and policy_checks for no_new_stub_symbols + reclassification_requires_conformance (fixture+conformance evidence per reclassified symbol). Integrated gate into scripts/ci.sh extended path. Verification commands: scripts/check_support_matrix_maintenance.sh ; scripts/check_support_matrix_maintenance.sh --strict ; python3 -m py_compile scripts/generate_support_matrix_maintenance.py ; python3 scripts/generate_support_matrix_maintenance.py --self-test. Artifact updated: tests/conformance/support_matrix_maintenance_report.v1.json.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SunnyOx","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:00:12.044828600Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T21:32:25.471732543Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T21:32:25.471714389Z","close_reason":"Implemented coverage dashboard + classification gate policy (no-new-stub + reclassification-conformance) with CI integration and passing verification commands","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","frankenlibc","symbols","tracking"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ldj.7","depends_on_id":"bd-ldj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ldj.8","title":"Symbols: Logging - per-symbol invocation traces, classification events","description":"Logging spec for symbols: TRACE for per-symbol invocation with args/return (opt-in, high volume), DEBUG for symbol classification changes and conformance fixture matches, INFO for new symbol implementation events and coverage milestone notifications, WARN for GlibcCallThrough invocations that should be Implemented, ERROR for symbol resolution failures. Cardinality budget on per-symbol metrics.","notes":"2026-02-13 progress (SunnyOx): implemented structured symbol-classification logging in support-matrix maintenance gate path. check_support_matrix_maintenance now emits JSONL events at target/conformance/support_matrix_maintenance.log.jsonl with fields {timestamp,trace_id,level,event,mode,api_family,symbol,outcome,errno,artifact_refs,details}; includes coverage_summary, status_counts, status_validation_issue (WARN for GlibcCallThrough issues), policy outcomes, gate_result, and opt-in TRACE per-symbol status snapshots via FRANKENLIBC_SYMBOL_GATE_TRACE=1. Validation: scripts/check_support_matrix_maintenance.sh ; scripts/check_support_matrix_maintenance.sh --strict ; FRANKENLIBC_SYMBOL_GATE_TRACE=1 scripts/check_support_matrix_maintenance.sh ; bash -n scripts/check_support_matrix_maintenance.sh.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"MagentaFalcon","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:05:42.487346784Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T07:12:16.029065549Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T07:12:16.029023050Z","close_reason":"Structured symbol logging contract is implemented and now regression-tested (comment #575).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenlibc","logging","observability","symbols"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ldj.8","depends_on_id":"bd-ldj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1122,"issue_id":"bd-ldj.8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed bd-ldj.8 logging closure pass by adding deterministic regression coverage for support-matrix structured symbol logging.

Code changes:
- Updated `crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/support_matrix_maintenance_test.rs` with:
  - JSONL loader + gate runner helpers
  - `maintenance_gate_emits_structured_logs_with_required_fields`
  - `maintenance_gate_trace_flag_emits_symbol_status_snapshot_events`
  - lock guard to serialize gate-writer tests and avoid log/report races
- Tests assert required logging fields (`timestamp`, `trace_id`, `level`, `event`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `outcome`, `errno`, `artifact_refs`, `details`), `gate_result`, WARN classification semantics for `GlibcCallThrough`, and TRACE opt-in behavior.

Verification:
1) rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test support_matrix_maintenance_test -- --nocapture
   - PASS (6 passed, 0 failed).
2) cargo fmt --check --package frankenlibc-harness
   - PASS after formatting.
3) rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --all-targets
   - FAIL due unrelated in-flight `frankenlibc-core/src/string/regex.rs` compile errors (`Ast::Repeat` missing `greedy`; `CompiledRegex` missing `last_error`/`pattern`).
4) rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --all-targets -- -D warnings
   - FAIL due same unrelated regex refactor breakage and existing workspace lint debt outside this bead.

Representative failure signatures:
- error[E0559]: variant `Ast::Repeat` has no field named `greedy`
- error[E0560]: struct `CompiledRegex` has no field named `last_error`
- error[E0560]: struct `CompiledRegex` has no field named `pattern`

Coordination:
- Registered `MagentaFalcon` in Agent Mail, confirmed empty ack-required inbox, and posted cross-agent status update in thread `coord-2026-02-25-magentafalcon`.
","created_at":"2026-02-25T07:12:12Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-lxm5","title":"Cross-cutting: franken_shadow differential conformance harness","description":"Integrate with franken_shadow for differential conformance: run FrankenLibC vs glibc/musl and compare outputs. Must support the suite-wide shadow-run as DEFAULT adoption wedge with hierarchical delta debugging for auto-minimizing failing traces. Reuse shared harness, do not fork.

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:17.110477928Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T23:07:20.677317959Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adoption-wedge","conformance","cross-crate","frankenlibc","shadow"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lxm5","depends_on_id":"bd-2hh","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lxm5","depends_on_id":"bd-epeg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
